query:
UPDATE musicVideoScenes
SET 
  status = 'pending',
  taskId = NULL,
  videoUrl = NULL,
  errorMessage = NULL,
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE jobId = 510025;

-- Verify the reset
SELECT id, status, errorMessage FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE id = 510025;
SELECT COUNT(*) as sceneCount, status FROM musicVideoScenes WHERE jobId = 510025 GROUP BY status;
